content.problemStatement:
Consider an array BBB of size MMM.

We must perform the following operations with parameter i=1,2,…,M−1i = 1, 2, \ldots, M - 1i=1,2,…,M−1 (in this order):

Note that the order of operations is different than SUBSEQI.


Choose an index jjj such that i<j≤Mi \lt j \le Mi<j≤M;
Replace BjB_jBj​ in the array with max⁡(0,Bj−Bi)\max(0, B_j - B_i)max(0,Bj​−Bi​).

Note that the subsequent operations will be performed with the updated array BBB.
At the end of all operations, let f(B)f(B)f(B) denote the **maximum possible sum** of all elements of array BBB.

You are given an array AAA of size NNN.

Find the sum of f(X)f(X)f(X) for all XXX which are non-empty subsequences of AAA. Note that there are exactly 2N−12^N - 12N−1 such XXX.

Since the answer may be huge, output it modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains one integer NNN, the size of the array AAA.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers, A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2,\ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the sum of f(X)f(X)f(X) over all 2N−12^N - 12N−1 subsequences of AAA, modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2⋅1052 \cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: It can be seen that :

f([1])=1f([1]) = 1f([1])=1
f([2])=2f([2]) = 2f([2])=2
f([3])=3f([3]) = 3f([3])=3
f([1,2])=2f([1, 2]) = 2f([1,2])=2
f([2,3])=3f([2, 3]) = 3f([2,3])=3
f([1,3])=3f([1, 3]) = 3f([1,3])=3
f([1,2,3])=4f([1, 2, 3]) = 4f([1,2,3])=4 : You first choose j=2j = 2j=2 for operation with i=1i = 1i=1, and the new array is [1,1,3][1, 1, 3][1,1,3] and then you choose j=3j = 3j=3 for operation with i=2i = 2i=2, and the final array is [1,1,2][1, 1, 2][1,1,2]. Note that you subtracted the updated value of B2B_2B2​, i.e. 111 instead of the original 222.

Thus, the sum of f(X)f(X)f(X) over all non-empty subsequences of AAA equals 181818.
